nasb.text: With what shall I come to the Lord And bow myself before the God on high? Shall I come to Him with burnt offerings, With yearling calves?

esv.text: “With what shall I come before the Lord, and bow myself before God on high? Shall I come before him with burnt offerings, with calves a year old?

cnv.text: 我朝見耶和華， 在至高的　神面前叩拜，當獻上甚麼呢？ 我朝見他的時候，當獻上燔祭， 當獻上一歲的牛犢嗎？

ccb.text: 我要拿什么朝见耶和华， 在天上的上帝面前叩拜呢？ 要献上一岁的牛犊作燔祭吗？
